children.value: Pythia Cookbooks provide example workflows on more advanced and domain-specific problems developed by the Pythia community. Cookbooks build on top of skills you learn in
Cookbooks are created from Jupyter Notebooks that we strive to binderize so each Cookbook can be
executed in the cloud with a single click from your browser
, but in some instances executing a Cookbook will require
